description: A per-user virtual chat peer backed by an in-browser WebLLM model. Each operator runs their own Karen locally; Karens gossip presence on the chat mesh so operators can see how many are online and fan out super-Karen questions.

id.description: stable peer id, formed as karen:<operatorPeerId>

model.description: which WebLLM model backs this Karen, picked from a smallest-first candidate list at runtime

source.description: ESM URL for the webllm runtime
